summary: Iteration 45 - FOUR Celebration Upgrade + Sound Effects Testing COMPLETE. All 4 celebration types (SIX, FOUR, WICKET, PRIZE) working perfectly. FOUR celebration now has 270+ particles (upgraded from 120) with 4 waves (embers, sparks, horizontal sweep, ambient) + light rays + boundary streaks + screen shake=10. Web Audio API sound effects (CelebrationSounds.js) integrated with procedural synthesis. All sounds wrapped in try/catch so AudioContext issues don't crash the app.
critical_code_review_comments: CelebrationOverlay.jsx: FOUR celebration upgraded to 270+ particles in 4 waves - VERIFIED
Wave 1: 140 electric blue embers with speed=14, trail=true
Wave 2: 60 bright white sparks with speed=16
Wave 3: 60 horizontal sweep particles (30 per side) for boundary feel
Wave 4: 40 floating blue ambient particles with wobble=0.4
LightRays component renders 12 rays for FOUR celebration
BoundaryStreaks component renders 3 horizontal light beams
Screen shake intensity=10 for FOUR (was 6 in iteration 44)
CelebrationSounds.js: Web Audio API procedural synthesis - NO EXTERNAL AUDIO FILES
playSixSound(): Bass hit + crack + crowd roar (2.5s)
playFourSound(): Crack + bass hit + crowd roar (1.8s)
playWicketSound(): Stump crash + bails tinkle + crowd gasp
playPrizeSound(): Victory fanfare (C5-E5-G5-C6) + sparkle + crowd roar
All sound functions wrapped in try/catch for graceful failure
AudioContext lazy initialization with resume() for autoplay policy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified the FOUR celebration upgrade (270+ particles) and Web Audio API sound effects. Key verified features: 1) Login flow works (Get Started -> Phone -> PIN -> Admin Dashboard -> Player View). 2) Match Detail page shows 4 demo celebration buttons (SIX, FOUR, WICKET, WINNER). 3) FOUR celebration: Electric blue explosion with 270+ particles in 4 waves, 'BOUNDARY!' text, 'RACING TO THE FENCE' subtitle, light rays, boundary streaks, screen shake=10. 4) SIX celebration: 200+ fire embers, 'MAXIMUM!' text, crowd roar sound. 5) WICKET celebration: Stumps shattering, 'WICKET!' slam, 'TIMBER!' subtitle. 6) PRIZE celebration: 300 confetti, firework bursts, 'CHAMPION!' text, victory fanfare. 7) All celebrations auto-dismiss after duration (3-4 seconds). 8) No console errors during celebrations. 9) No AudioContext errors (sounds silently fail if not available).

sound_effects.wicket_sound: Stump crash + bails tinkle + crowd gasp
sound_effects.error_handling: All wrapped in try/catch for graceful failure
